prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `4f537728`.
codex_response:
Implemented `4f537728` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: a single non-`1` `2x2` marker block selects one row-band and one column-band in the `2x2`-block lattice, and every existing `1` cell on that cross is recolored to the marker color. The summary hint was used; it matched the official examples, so no `notes.md` or new DSL primitive was needed.

Validation passed end-to-end: `python -m arc2.shared.verify --task 4f537728` passed `3/3` official examples, `python -m arc2.shared.build --task 4f537728 --n-examples 1000` produced the artifacts, and `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 4f537728` passed `1000/1000` generated examples. Visual inspection of the preview sheet matched the official 20x20 lattice family.
